title: Fixing Internet Problems
drDigitalIntro: Internet not working? First check: is WiFi on? Is your device connected to the right network? Try turning WiFi off and back on — this refreshes the connection. If that doesn't work, restart your router (unplug for 30 seconds, then plug back in). If your neighbor's internet works but yours doesn't, it may be an outage from your provider — check their website on your phone.

steps.say: Read the error — no internet connection.
Open WiFi Settings to check your connection.
WiFi is connected but no internet. Toggle WiFi off.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the WiFi! Toggling WiFi off and on refreshes the connection — a simple first fix.
drDigitalHint: Open WiFi Settings, toggle WiFi off then back on, and reconnect to your network.
